name: Image Suite
author: saintorphan
description: Image workbench: Txt2Img, Img2Img, MultiCanvas (layered draw / mask / inpaint) and a Modify editor (crop / resize / flip / colour) for Flux, Z-Image and the SDXL lineup (Pony, Illustrious). Save any result to the other pages, Img2Vid, the Prompt Library, disk — or, with the SendTo plugin, to other tabs and plugins.
